Implement conversation branching with context lineage (#6)

Add support for branching conversations with full context inheritance from parent conversations. Implements schema changes for BRANCHED_FROM edges, API contracts for branch metadata, branch creation endpoint, sidebar nesting with visual hierarchy, context loader extensions for parent lineage, and UI branch button with nested conversation display. All 6 planned tasks complete: schema, contracts, endpoint, sidebar nesting, context inheritance, and UI.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

content.thinking: Good, I have the workspace diff. Now I can create the PR using `gh pr create --base main`. The diff shows all the changes for the conversation branching feature. Let me create the PR with a clear title and description.

content.text: Now I'll create the PR on main:

input.command:
gh pr create --title "Implement conversation branching with context lineage" --base main --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary

Implements Phase 2 of GitHub issue #6: Conversation branching with full context lineage. Users can now branch conversations from any point in chat history, and branched conversations inherit all context from their parent conversations and lineage.

## Changes

- **Schema**: Added BRANCHED_FROM edge type to track parent-child conversation relationships
- **API Contracts**: Extended ConversationSidebarItem with parentId and branches fields for nested display
- **Branch Endpoint**: New POST endpoint to create branches with auto-populated parent context
- **Sidebar Nesting**: Recursive rendering with depth-based indentation and visual hierarchy  
- **Context Inheritance**: Context loaders now traverse BRANCHED_FROM edges to load parent entities
- **UI**: Branch button in chat header with nested conversation display in sidebar

All 6 planned tasks complete. TypeScript compiles clean, 129 unit tests passing.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)"
